song_name: Graduation Mashup 2019 Maroon 5 - Memories - Juice World Ft Benny Blanco - Graduation
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]
As we go on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D#m[/ch]
We remember[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
All the times we[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
Spent together[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]
And as our lives change[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Come whatever[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
We will still be[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Friends forever[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                       [ch]F#[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                     [ch]D#m[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]F#[/ch]
Of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                       [ch]F#[/ch]
Toast to the ones here today[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                [ch]D#m[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]F#[/ch]
And the memories bring back, memories bring back you[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]                      [ch]G#m[/ch]               [ch]D#m[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I did not know no pain[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]                                    [ch]F#[/ch]
When I believed in forever, and everything would stay the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]G#m[/ch]                     [ch]D#m[/ch]
Now my heart feel like December when somebody say your name[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]
'Cause I can't reach out to call you, but I know I will one day, yeah[/tab]


[Hook]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]F#[/ch]
Everybody hurts sometimes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                        [ch]D#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Everybody hurts someday, ayy ayy[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
But everything gon' be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]F#[/ch]
Go and raise a glass and say, ayy[/tab]

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                [ch]D#m[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]F#[/ch]
